headline: Essex Property (ESS) Trust Gets Higher Price Target from Truist
summary: Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) is included among the 10 Safe Stocks to Buy for the Long Term in 2026. On May 27, Truist raised the firm’s price recommendation on Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) to $286 from $273. It reiterated a Hold rating on the shares.
